[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000011 3
1 1101011 5
2 1011011 5
3 0011111 5
4 1111010 5
5 1101010 4
6 1111101 6
7 1011111 6

67 76 1111111 a
70 07 1111101 6 match 6
